name: com.uralstech.uxr.questcamera
description:
A Unity package to use the new Meta Quest Passthrough Camera API.

UXR.QuestCamera v4.0.0 is a rewrite of the package with lots of breaking changes. Please see the documentation, reference manual and updated sample for changes.

samples.description: A sample showcasing a Unity Sentis (formerly known as Unity Inference Engine (formerly known as Unity Sentis)) digit recognition model being used with the Meta Quest Passthrough Camera API.
